title: CapabilityToken
description: A signed, scoped authorization credential that grants the bearer permission to invoke specific capabilities. Issued by agent-kernel. Must be scoped and have an expiry or single-use flag.

principal.description: Identity of the principal (user, agent, or service) this token was issued to.

scope.description: List of capability IDs this token authorizes. Must not be empty; unbounded scope is not permitted.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this token was issued.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. Null only if single_use is true.

single_use.description: If true, this token is invalidated after a single successful authorization. expires_at may be null for single-use tokens.

issuer.description: Optional identifier of the agent-kernel instance that issued this token.
